title: fix: bump image server registry TTL and timeout
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Banishing ghost servers
gist.blurb: We taught our image routing system to be a little more patient with global state syncs. Say goodbye to those random 'no active servers' errors during heavy bursts.
gist.summary: Increased the image server registry TTL and timeout to account for Cloudflare KV's eventual consistency lag.
gist.impact: Users will experience significantly fewer dropped requests and 500 errors when generating multiple images in quick succession.
gist.visual_concept: The bee and the monitor-head robot working together in a cozy server room. The robot holds a stopwatch (representing the increased timeout/TTL) while the bee organizes glowing image files, symbolizing the stabilized registry.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot working together in a warm server room. The robot holds a glowing stopwatch while the bee organizes glowing image files into a lime green (#ecf874) filing cabinet. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
